requested_items.objective: Run bounded synth-only nm2 npu_top SOFTMAX/EVENT command-queue subpath ablations to isolate the descriptor logic responsible for the prior CQ slice timeout.

expected_result.reason: The output should identify whether SOFTMAX checks, SOFTMAX issue, EVENT signal, EVENT wait, dynamic event_state indexing, or their combination causes the synthesis timeout.
